'''Amaya''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] who attended the celebrations in [[Gadrin]] for the 200th anniversary of the [[City/Legends|city's]] founding by [[Reidi Artom]]. She and her friend [[Suki]] went to [[Vanster Enan's Sop House]] to try to find men to party with. By the time that [[Darin]] burst into the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], she had hooked up with [[Kip (Human)|Kip]], who was a greaseball but the only prospect in the Sop House.

{{Char-stub}}
